Localization.Description: Attempt to change Vault engine settings

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to change the settings of Vault engine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} changed the settings of Vault engine {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
